required_skills: Original scientific research design including hypothesis formulation, experimental design, and statistical analysis
Peer-reviewed publication writing and scientific communication for high-impact journals
Advanced statistical methods including Bayesian inference, hypothesis testing, and multivariate analysis
Literature review and systematic synthesis of state-of-the-art research across scientific domains
Grant writing and research proposal development for competitive funding bodies (NSF, NIH, DARPA, UKRI)
Scientific programming and data analysis in Python or R for experimental data processing
Experimental methodology design including control group selection, randomisation, and bias mitigation
Research data management including version control, reproducibility standards, and open science practices
Cross-disciplinary collaboration with engineering, product, and clinical teams to translate research into applications
Laboratory instrumentation operation, calibration, and experimental protocol development
preferred_skills: Experience with machine learning or deep learning methods applied to scientific discovery problems
Familiarity with high-performance computing (HPC) environments for large-scale simulation or data analysis
Knowledge of causal inference methods and counterfactual reasoning frameworks
Experience mentoring junior researchers and leading small research workstreams
Familiarity with intellectual property (IP) disclosure and patent filing processes in an R&D setting
Experience presenting research at top-tier international conferences (NeurIPS, ICML, Nature conferences)
Knowledge of meta-analysis techniques and systematic review methodologies
responsibilities: Design and execute original research programmes by formulating testable hypotheses, selecting appropriate methodologies, and managing end-to-end experimental workflows
Analyse complex, high-dimensional experimental datasets using advanced statistical and machine learning methods to extract reproducible, publication-ready insights
Author and publish peer-reviewed research papers in top-tier scientific journals, managing the full submission, revision, and peer review correspondence lifecycle
Develop and submit competitive research grant proposals to government funding bodies (NSF, NIH, DARPA) and industrial sponsors, defining research objectives, milestones, and budgets
Conduct systematic literature reviews and horizon-scanning activities to identify emerging research trends and position the organisation's research portfolio at the scientific frontier
Present research findings at international conferences, invited seminars, and internal technical reviews, communicating complex results clearly to both specialist and non-specialist audiences
Collaborate with engineering and product teams to identify translational pathways for fundamental research outputs, supporting technology transfer and prototype development activities
Establish and maintain rigorous data management practices including experimental provenance tracking, reproducibility documentation, and open-access data sharing per FAIR data principles
Mentor and supervise junior researchers, PhD students, and research interns, providing scientific guidance, code review, and career development support
Identify intellectual property opportunities arising from research activities, working with IP counsel to evaluate patentability and file provisional patent applications
